name: QA Lab Automation Report - Users Module

subs.title: API: GET - Users returns 200 and a valid JSON array @smoke @regression

subs.title: API: DELETE - Users should remove user
API: GET - Users should return 200 and array

subs.title: API: GET - Users should return valid schema
API: GET - Users with filter should return correct results
Integration: API matches DB for created user
API: POST should fail with missing required fields
API: POST invalid email (cleanup if inserted)
API: POST invalid role (cleanup if inserted)
API: PATCH non-existent user should not crash
API: DELETE non-existent user should not fail
API: PATCH - Users should update role
API:POST - Users should fail with missing fields
Constraint: Emails should not be null
Constraint: Required fields should not be null
Constraint: Emails should have valid format
Constraint: created_at should not be in the future
Constraint: Names should not be empty strings
CRUD: INSERT should create a new user
CRUD: SELECT should retrieve correct user
CRUD: UPDATE should modify user role
DB: Users table contains at least one record @smoke
DB: Users table returns required profile fields @smoke @regression
DB: Users table should not contain null emails @smoke @regression
DB: Users columns have correct data types
DB: Column naming should remain consistent
DB: Names should not be empty
DB: Emails should be valid format
DB: created_at should not be in the future
DB: created_at should not be null
DB: Users sorted by created_at DESC
DB: Email column should be indexed
Index: Users table should have a primary key index on id
Index: Users table should have an index on email
Schema: Users table should have expected columns
Schema: Users columns should have correct data types
Schema: Sample record should match expected structure
Schema: created_at should be a valid date
UI: User list page displays the QA lab heading @smoke @regression
